extension.description: Chat with Hermes Agent directly inside VS Code
viewsContainers.activitybar.title: Hermes Agent
views.hermesChat.name: Chat
commands.hermes.newChat.title: Hermes: New Chat
commands.hermes.openChat.title: Hermes: Open Chat
commands.hermes.sendSelection.title: Hermes: Insert Selection into Chat
commands.hermes.reloadExtension.title: Reload Extension
commands.hermes.reloadSession.title: Reload Current Session
commands.hermes.openSettings.title: Settings
commands.hermes.checkUpdate.title: Check for Updates
commands.hermes.openAbout.title: About
commands.hermes.openHelp.title: Help
commands.hermes.openLogs.title: Logs
submenus.hermes.reloadMenu.label: Reload
submenus.hermes.moreMenu.label: More
configuration.title: Rina Hermes ACP
configuration.hermes.path.description: Path to the Hermes executable. Leave empty to auto-detect.
configuration.hermes.cwd.description: Working directory for Hermes sessions. Defaults to workspace root.
configuration.hermes.profile.description: Hermes profile name (maps to hermes --profile <name>). Leave empty for default.
configuration.hermes.showThoughts.descri: Show agent thinking process in the chat.
configuration.hermes.showToolCalls.descr: Show tool call notifications in the chat.
configuration.hermes.models.description: Fallback model list when Hermes does not expose ACP session config options.
configuration.hermes.models.markdownDesc:
Used when the agent does not return `configOptions` with a model selector. Example:
```json
[
  { "id": "claude-sonnet", "name": "Claude Sonnet" },
  { "id": "gpt-4o", "name": "GPT-4o" }
]
```
configuration.hermes.defaultModel.descri: Default model id from hermes.models (fallback list only).
configuration.hermes.agents.description: List of named agent configurations for quick switching via the chat UI.
configuration.hermes.agents.markdownDesc:
List of named agent configurations for quick switching. Each agent can have a different `path`, `profile`, and `cwd`. Example:
```json
[
  { "name": "Default", "profile": "" },
  { "name": "Fast", "path": "/path/to/hermes", "profile": "fast" }
]
```
